title: elec Space Wireless Mouse，Cool Sport Car Shape Computer Wireless Mouse Optical Cordless Mice with USB Receiver for PC Laptop 1600 DPI 3 Buttons Black
description:
Cool sport car shaped wireless mouse for laptop computer notebook,eyecatching ergonomic design,good choice as gifts for both kids and adults. Mini Receiver can be contained into the mouse and easy to carry.Light weight enough to take it everywhere. Uses 2.4Ghz wireless optical technology, transmission up to 10 metres operating distance. Plug and play, no need any drive, works on most surfaces smoothly Support most operating system, Windows 98 / ME / NT / 2000 / XP / Vista / Win 7 / Linux or Mac OS. With cool design and comfortable hand feeling,this wireless mouse give you special experience in using it.   Powered by 2 * AAA battery (Not Included),Dimension:4.4(L)*1.42(H)*2.16(W)inch,Net weight: 2.12 oz,1600 DPI,3 Buttons.   Switch Life: 5 million cycles,Automatically Power saving sleeping function.
How to use:
1.Please slide the top cover backwards,then you can see the USB receiver and battery slot;When using it, it is best to plug the USB receiver into the computer first and then install the battery to turn the switch on. Prepare 2* AAA battery when you first use it(not included);Turn on the switch,use on mouse pad,the mouse and receiver will connect automatically in a few seconds. 2.If not connect,please turn off the mouse switch,pull down the USB receiver,then plug the USB receiver and turn on the mouse switch again, press the 3 buttons(left button,right button,scroll wheel) together at same time for about 3-5 seconds.
Notes:
Cute design with LED headlight,the headlight is formed only because of light transmission,sometimes it hides inside that you cannot see it,this won't affect use. The light is not strong,this could save battery power.
Package Included:
1 x Wireless mouse 1 x USB receiver (placed inside the top cover) 1 x Using instruction
features: Wireless usb computer mouse with headlight and fashion sport car design, cool gaming mouse for laptop computer,good choice for using or as Christmas gifts for kids,women,men.
Powered by 2*AAA battery(Not included),Size: 4.4*2.16*1.42 inch,Net weight: 2.12 oz,1600 DPI,3 Buttons (Push the top cover,then you can see the USB receiver and battery slot inside).
Plug and Play, no any drive is needed;Power-saving sleeping function,if the mouse is not used for short time, it will turn to power saving mode to save energy.
2.4GHz wireless digital transmission technology, operation distance is up to 10 meters; Package Included:1 x Wireless mouse1 x USB receiver (placed inside the top cover)1 x Using instruction.
Support most operating system, Windows 98 / ME / NT / 2000 / XP / Vista / Win 7 / Linux or Mac OS and more.

reviews.title: ASMR fantastic!
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:5a9baeffb5013de01b566ac34f1da8a5]] Love the way this keyboard sounds as I type.  I also like that the round keys allow a little more room in between keys and that I don’t make as many errors while typing.  The color is great and the design is think and sleek.

reviews.title: my favorite keyboard
reviews.text: This keyboard is the best! It is comfortable to use, matches my desk setup perfectly, and best of all, the keys AND the mouse are basically totally silent! My 10-month-old is a VERY light sleeper! Everything wakes her up, but not these. A major win for me! Highly recommend. 100% I would buy this again! (batteries are not included. You need one aa battery for the keyboard and also the mouse)

reviews.title: Wired + Wireless?  Work for you? Good multimedia controls & phone slot
reviews.text:
Not a fan of wireless accessories (the batteries typically fail without warning, makers want you to be surprised), I made an exception for this pairing model because the keyboard is wired.

PRO
-Ubiquitous AA battery for mouse
-Economical
-Numeric pad
-Multimedia buttons: Volume knob, buttons for mute, pause, previous, next
-A place to put your phone (nice touch!)

CON
-Neither is backlit
-KB not programmable

NEUTRAL
-Non-'clack-y' key design, these are "quiet"
-Some humans will like pink, not widely available, maybe a good gift
-Con (for me) is the wireless mouse

reviews.title: Fun cordless mouse and keyboard
reviews.text: This is a great little retro cordless keyboard and mouse combo. I ordered it because it has just one dongle that both operate from. That gives me more USB ports available for other things. It works great as long as the keyboard and mouse are close to the laptop or the tower. It lags a bit when it’s in a keyboard drawer. I like the compact and portable nature this setup includes!

reviews.title: pink keyboard and wireless mouse
reviews.text: Love the pink color of this retro keyboard and mouse.  Great that the keyboard is spill proof I can have my coffee and not worry about wrecking my keyboard.  Easily plugged right into my all-in-one computer.  Took me a little while to get used to the punk keycaps, and now I love how quiet and comfortable they are to use.  The mouse fits well in my hand, and the wheel rolls back and forth smoothly. Top 5 stars for this one!

reviews.title: Works well, light, easy.
reviews.text: This works really well, I do wish it had a little bit more weight to it.  I use the surface mouse generally and love it.  I bought this as a replacement bc I transitioned my surface mouse to my work computer. This works similarly well, it’s just so light it doesn’t feel as sturdy.  It won’t work with 2 devices at once, you have to keep switching, but does have multiple ways to connect.

reviews.title: Sharp, poor cursor control, poor scrolling
reviews.text: I had hoped, for this price, I might get something that worked...NOT!  The edges are sharp and very uncomfortable.  If you have tiny hands, this might work.  Scrolling is pretty much a bumpy ride, all or nothing, no matter how you set the scroll.  The cursor was very hard to control and very hard to get it in the right place.  Yes, I played with mouse settings and tried to tweak but no go.

reviews.title: Awesome Bluetooth function and great price!
reviews.text: After ordering two other “blue tooth” mice and having to return them both when they were dependent on a USB port, this one came through with flying colors and was cheaper than the first two I had to buy and return!!

reviews.title: Love this mouse
reviews.text: Great color selection. Fits my hand well.

reviews.title: I'll never go back to a flat mouse
reviews.text: I was suffering from tennis elbow for months, badly, and nothing I did was making any difference.  I have a job typing about 10 hours a day, eight days a week:/ and did some research about posture and what could cause this.  Already had an ergo keyboard, so I bought this ergo mouse.  WOW.  Unbelievable how almost immediately the tennis elbow cleared up.  This was super easy to get use to.  I have small hands, and the size is perfect.  I will never use a flat mouse again.  So very glad I stumbled upon this.  Best money I've ever spent.  Oh, and I absolutely love the fact that I do not have to replace batteries every week!

reviews.title: Well designed mouse, nothing like it
reviews.text: I love picking out a color I will enjoy looking at, other than basic black or white mice. I wanted the blue one forever, and years ago I got one in pink instead of blue per their mistake. I just kept it. I used it and yes it still works, I really wanted the blue one so I took my time to look for another one just like it and yes it is hard to find this blue color. Beautiful. The fit is very smooth and soft and perfect, they know what hands like to rest in a cupped shape and this is comfortable to work with. The glide is excellent and can be used for everyday, office, or gaming. Take a look around at other styles but you will not find one that fits like this ergonomically for the price which you cannot beat. The best part is that it is rechargeable and yes it comes with the cord and also you can use it while it is charging. Keep your wrist happy and get one.

reviews.title: Great ergonomic feel!
reviews.text: This is a great wireless mouse! It has been wonders to my carpel tunnel on my hand and love the natural feel of this. All computer mouses should be made like this, it just makes sense when you first use it. Anyways, seems pretty sturdy and have had no complaints since receiving it. Smooth trailing, battery seems to last long and love that it goes to sleep mode when not in use. Also, love the color; it's exactly as pictured!

reviews.title: Nice. But too small...
reviews.text:
I normally use medium sized gloves. sometimes small.

This mouse was designed for smaller hands than mine.

It's a nice mouse. small, cheap, comfortable, works well. the scroll wheel was really fun to use. but it didn't work for my case.

reviews.title: A very nice mouse.
reviews.text:
I tried to use both of the most recent Apple mouse products with my Macbook Pro and never could get the hang of either one of them. I tried configuring them in the applications folder but never could get it right plus neither one of them was comfortable. One had a ball and the other newer one did not. Usually I really like apple products but not this time. I am happy to report this Logitech worked right out of the box after I plugged in the USB thingy. i didn't even have to set it up. I do like the roller ball. I think this mouse can do more than I know about, but am just happy it isn't changing the page I am on constantly. I got the one that was painted blue and green because it was about 6.00 cheaper than the solid colored ones. I like the design now that I have it. Since my laptop only has two USB plug ins, I bought the Amazon USB hub with three additional spots. Am happy with that too.
UPDATE 11-08-14
All of a sudden I am getting these messages saying the battery is critically low. To start with I was changing the batteries every time but it was happening way too fast so I bought a battery checker. Turns out my batteries are fine. Testing 100 %. the mouse continue to operate even though I continue receiving low battery warnings. Don't know how this is going to play out but it is the first sign of trouble. Now I just take battery out. Test it and when it continues to say 100 % I put it back in and the message goes away for a couple of days. Aggravating. I am amending star count down to 4 stars. Can't change stars.

reviews.title: Works great - great little wireless mouse.
reviews.text: I got this for my daughters birthday - she loved the design.  It synced right up and worked immediately.  It worked great with her computer - she really liked he feel of the mouse.  It is easy to pack away and travel with as well.

reviews.title: The middle click and scroll wheel work great! Microsoft 4000 is smoother and more comfortable though.
reviews.text:
I own this mouse as well as the Microsoft Wireless Mobile Mouse 4000 now. I find them to be head to head competitors, so here's a quick comparison.

Logitech:
-Somewhat of a loud click, doesn't bother me personally, but it is obviously louder
-The harder you flick the scroll wheel the more it'll spin. There is resistance though and I feel like it's easier to use than the Microsoft mouse.
-It looks cool and functionality is fine. The middle click is easy to use and the left/right of the wheel to move back or forward in a web browser works and isn't annoyingly used by accident.

Microsoft:
-Quiet click and smoother sliding on the desk
-The wheel stops once your finger leaves it. You can't just flick and go. Scrolling seems more precise with this one, but I actually prefer the Logitech as I feel like I have more functional control with it.
-There is a side button that moves you backward in a web browser, the wheel left and right tilting doesn't seem to do anything.
-More comfortable in my hand.

Bottom line: Microsoft Wireless Mobile Mouse 4000 is smoother and more comfortable, but Logitech is more functional, especially for the middle click and scroll wheel. I was very skeptical about the benefits of this "free-wheel" but I love it now. If you're not a big scroll wheel and middle click enthusiast go with the Microsoft, otherwise the Logitech is for you.

title: Neises Ergonomic Mouse, Bluetooth Mouse for ipad,Bluetooth Mouse for MacBook Air/Mac/MacBook Pro/Mini/ipad Pro/iMac/Laptop,Rechargeable Wireless Mouse for MacBook Air/MacBook pro Chromebook Laptop PC
description:
Tip:Scientific ergonomic design maintains healthy wrist and arm positions to achieve smoother movement and reduce overall stress.
How to use it:
A. 2.4Ghz Mode:
Switch to "ON/OFF" button to right.And Plug the receiver into the USB port or use a USB C adapter to plug into the type c port of your computer, Then you can use the mouse in 2.4GHz Mode.
B. Bluetooth Mode:
Switch on Bluetooth on your device and power on the mouse. Press the DPI Button or Press Left,Roller and Right 3 Buttons together for 5 seconds.When the mouse name coming up on the device.Click it and it will be connected.
Note:
System Requirement: Windows 8/10, Android 4.2 and above,Mac & IOS 10.10(Compatiable with 4.2BLE、4.1BLE、4.0BLE or earlier)
Package Included:
1* Dual Mode Mouse
1* Charging Cable
1*USB Receiver (under earth the mouse)
1*Type C Adapter
Note:
1. It's out of power if the mouse cursor moves slowly or stop moving. Please recharge it. Note: Please do not charge the mouse with mobile phone charger.
2. Please charge the mouse for 2 hours before the first time to use it. The blue light beside the scroll wheel will be on while charging, and then goes off when the mouse is fully charged.
3. Not all computers support two modes. For example, Win 7 system does not support Bluetooth mode.
4. There is memory function on Bluetooth Type Mouse.When the mouse has connected another device,and now you would like connect the device not connected with the mouse last time, it should re-connect with the device.
5. If choosing Bluetooth connecting way, don’t insert USB receiver to the device you would to connect.Otherwise,it will choose 2.4G connecting way automatically.
features: 【2022 Latest Upgrade Optical Ergonomic Design】Reduce the overall pressure on the hand, specially designed for long-term use of the mouse, providing a more comfortable way to use.

【DUAL MODE BLUETOOTH MOUSE(BT 5.1 + 2.4GHz)】Dual mode wireless mouse one mouse can switch freely between two devices. Note: If choosing Bluetooth connecting way, don’t insert USB receiver to the device you would to connect.Otherwise,it will choose 2.4G connecting way automatically.

【BUILT-IN BATTERY AND AUTO ENERGY-SAVING】The mouse built-in rechargeable battery, with a charging cable. No need to change batteries. To saving power, the mouse will fall asleep after 10 minutes no-operation, it can be waken up by clicking any button.

【3 ADJUSTABLE DPI LEVELS AND SILENT CLICK】 Among 1000, 1200 and 1600 to meet different needs. Special soundless design for the right and left buttons, make you concentrate on working or playing games without disturbing others.
【MULTI-FUNCTION BUTTON】Forward and backward button to provide convenience for browsing pages and games.

reviews.text: I love the design of this mouse but the scrolling wheel started squeaking when used less than 14 days into using this mouse and it's, quite honestly, a bit maddening.  I can't figure out WHY it's squeaking and I've tried using compressed air to maybe clean something that might have gotten into the mouse to no avail.  It still squeaks.  All. The. Time.

reviews.title: Works perfectly with my iPad
reviews.text:
I bought this so I could mirror my iPad to my 27" iMac and play some gorgeous games on a big screen. The mouse lets me use the iPad as an, um, mousepad...works beautifully. The instructions were easy to follow and the box contains a wireless receiver if you don't want to use bluetooth. Also in the box is a USB adapter if you need to plug the receiver into a USB-C port.

And finally, the color-changing light bar is kinda sexy. A bargain at the price.

reviews.title: Works well, when it connects.  Update:  It loses connection WAY too much
reviews.text:
I like the mouse. Excellent value for money, except for one very annoying flaw. It is constantly disconnecting the bluetooth connection from my new Macbook Pro. It's pretty annoying.

After what feels like only a few minutes of idle time, the mouse bluetoothe disconnects. Then when I move it nothing happens for a couple seconds. The finally, it connects and my laptop tells me the mouse is back, and it works perfectly... until the next time it is idle.

I have use other low cost brands as well as my Apple Magic Mouse (which I don't use as I prefer a track wheel). I have not had any issues with the Bluetooth on those, only this one...

If it were not for the disconnect issue I would rate the mouse a 5 star. Otherwise, I give it a 3. I am still using it for now, but will find a better one...

UPDATE: Okay, I find that I am CONSTANTLY drustrated that this mouse loses connection with my laptop. PITA. Not worth using at any price.

It very briefly showed up on my Macbook as a keyboard, but never as a mouse, and now it won’t even do that. Save your money and get a mouse that will work.

reviews.title: Cheap and useless.
reviews.text: This mouse feels so cheap, it wasn’t even worth giving a review but I wanted to warn others to not get this mouse. It’s so flimsy and made so cheaply, I didn’t waste anymore time with it so I am returning.

reviews.title: Flawless Bluetooth connectivity with Mac
reviews.text: My Logitech M310 (been using them for 10-15 years) could not connect properly with my USB-C/Thunderbolt MacBookPro, using their USB dongle, thru a USB adapter. Scroll wheel would NOT work, and Logitech tech support said they would not update drivers. 'Don't use an adapter.' But they aren't aware that new Macs don't have old-school USB ports? Anyone else have this problem?! Anyway... this Seenda connects directly with Bluetooth, and connects instantly. If it sleeps (after a few hours?) it wakes and re-connects with one click, in less than a second. I charged the battery when I bought it a few weeks ago, and forgot that I might need to charge it again one day. Still going. Downsides: it is much smaller and lighter than I am used to (the M310 is easily twice as thick/tall) so I am getting used to that. Took awhile to find the right DPI/resolution/speed (and the button to change that is in a precarious, easy-to-hit-by-mistake position. Overall a great recommend.

▶ Wireless connectivity for reliable usage ▶ Noiseless click, soft touch, offers extremely comfort which can make you focus on what you do without disturbing others ▶ High dpi movement resolution works on most surfaces ▶ Three responsive buttons and a scroll wheel for quick navigation  ▶ Dimensions: 1.4 by 2.6 by 4.7 inches (H x W x D)  ▶ Operates with one AA battery ▶ Advanced optical mouse with responsive tracking ▶ Wireless mouse reduces workspace clutter ▶ 3-button mouse for better functionality and fast scrolling capability  ▶ Requires Windows XP, Vista, 7/8/10/2000 and Mac OS X 10.4 or later for operation ▶ Backed by 1-year limited warranty

Battery size: AA Computer Connectivity: Windows Interface(s): Alkaline Handedness: Ambidextrous Interface(s): USB 2.0 Number Of Batteries Required: 1 Wireless: Yes Warranty: 1 year Brand Compatibility: Universal Model Compatibility: PC, Laptop, Windows devices System Requirements: Windows XP, Windows 7, Windows Vista, Windows 8, Windows 10, Windows 2000, Mac OS X 10.4 or later  Number of Buttons: 3 Mouse Operation: Button(s) with scroll wheel Plug and Play Operation: Yes

features: Sensitive Mouse Click with Less Noise - Slim ergonomic design and smooth frosted surface for an incredible user experience. Quieter and Easier to click, make you concentrate on your work without disturbing others beside you

title: Logitech Wireless Mouse M325 (Celebration Black)
description: SMALL BUT MIGHTY Get work done anywhere with this small portable mouse. The size of M325 makes it great for users with smaller hands-including kids-or limited workspaces. The micro-precise scrolling and tilt wheel provide you the speed and accuracy you need. Easy-to-use and compatible with all of the main OS, it's ready to work in seconds and lasts up to 18 months without changing batteries. COMFORTABLE SHAPE, COMPACT DESIGN Stay productive longer thanks to the comfortable, contoured shape that follows the natural curve of your hand. Compact and wireless, M325 fits easily with your laptop in a bag-making it great for working on the go and homeschooling. It's also designed for both right- and left-handed users, allowing you to switch the left and right click via Logitech Options Software. FAST SCROLLING, PRECISE TRACKING Our micro-precise scrolling and tilt wheel give you the speed and precision you need to breeze through long pages, websites, links, spreadsheets, and images. Customize the tilt action to perform horizontal scroll, forward/backward, and more through Logitech Options. PLUG & PLAY SIMPLICITY Simply plug the USB receiver into your computer or laptop to start working in seconds and get a strong, reliable connection within up to 10 meters (33 feet),Plus, you can easily pair through the same receiver up to six compatible peripherals using Logitech Unifying™ technology. BROAD COMPATIBILITY M325 is compatible with most OS-Windows®, macOS®, Linux®.And is also a certified Works with Chromebook™product. INCREASED PRODUCTIVITY Get more done by combining M325 with your laptop. According to a recent study, laptop users who chose this mouse over a touchpad were 50% more productive and worked 30% faster. QUALITY YOU CAN RELY ON The mouse is built with the same high quality standards that have made Logitech t

reviews.title: Portable, durable and pretty
reviews.text: I travel for work and needed something light and easy to take with me to various work locations. I had a Microsoft wireless mouse but for some reason it didn't properly scroll in some of the programs I use for work so I replaced it with this one. It works great, it is easy to install, works even when the receiver portion is plugged into a USB splitter, and the design is cheery.

reviews.title: The Standard
reviews.text: The Logitech M325 is pretty much the standard wireless mouse that so many people have. The color pattern is nice and vibrant, and it's a cheap buy.

title: XINSHIS Wireless Mouse, 2.4G Wireless Mouse for Laptop, Ergonomic Computer Mouse Aluminum Alloy Wheel, 3 DPI Adjustment Levels, Leather Luxury Outfit. (Blue)
features: Innovative material craftsmanship and comfortable feel：Innovation blends leather patterns into the surface of the wireless mouse, and the upper part of the mouse is wrapped in leather as a whole, like a fine handicraft that present an elegant, light-looking artistic atmosphere. Unique feel when used.

Portable no noise click：Equipped with aluminum alloy wheel, the metal texture is more durable. Silent micro-buttons keep your Computer mouse quiet, whether in a quiet office, study ingress in a library or work late at night, to create a quiet and comfortable environment for you. Lightweight and portable, it's easy to fit in a backpack or pocket.

Plug and play stable transmission：Wireless mice can move freely in a range of up to 10 m to 15 m. You can easily use it without cable interference and enjoy more freedom than you think. DPI adjusts three horizontal accuracys (1000/1200/1600) to track the speed of the mouse more accurately and freely.

Wide range of compatibility: fully compatible with Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8 and 10 / Windows Vista / Windows ME, etc. Suitable for desktop computers, laptops, tablets, PCs, Macbooks and other devices. Please note: If your laptop is a Mac OS system, you will need to connect the USB-C adapter provided by our mouse.
Worry-free warranty: This wireless mouse for laptop enjoys 30 days money-back.

reviews.title: Glitches
reviews.text: I got this mouse because I left my good mouse at a friend's house, who I won't see for a month. I guess you get what you pay for because I've been working for about 2 hours and I've had to take the battery out to reset 5 times. The mouse icon just stops moving. At first I thought it happened when I was typing and went to move it again and it went to sleep, because the light went off. But it just stops mid move on a screen. It's almost better to just use the laptop track pad. I would not recommend

reviews.title: SAVE YOUR MONEY
reviews.text: .This mouse lasted maybe a week with the very light use that I gave it. The metal wheel no longer moves. I liked that it was quiet compared to my old one, but it should have lasted much longer

reviews.title: Love it.
reviews.text: I love the feel, easy to use and it looks good. Will recommend and purchase again.
